_provenance.purpose: Close VALIDATION.md sec 8.4 audit item #10: produce an AeroLab Strouhal at the Validation preset (D=20, B=5%) with >= 20 shedding cycles, so the three-way table (AeroLab / OpenFOAM / Williamson) reports St on all three columns instead of n/a on AeroLab.
_provenance.post_run_correction: The original 2026-06-01 bake (7.4 h wall) used a Strouhal extractor that mistakenly passed steps_per_sample=STEPS_PER_FRAME=35 to the FFT, treating cl_history as per-frame when it is actually per-LBM-step. Since n_cycles = St * window_du is invariant under that scaling, the true St / window_du have been recovered by multiplying St (and dividing window_du, dt_per_sample, fft_bin_width) by 35. The script has been fixed for future re-runs; the cd_tail_window keys are re-labeled to reflect that the underlying counts are LBM steps, not frames.
